announcements.title: Rin Shinonome (Cross-Forged Refinement) & Chester Lochburn Pickup Gachas Live
announcements.summary: Both pickup banners are live now through June 30, 2026 (22:59 UTC-04:00).

announcements.title: Gen Narumi (Japan's Strongest Combatant) Unlocked Potential Added
announcements.summary: Full UP1–UP5 data added to his character page, plus a new Unlocked Potential hub under Game Guide.

announcements.title: New Character Announced: Sagan Shinomiya (The Resurgent Commander)
announcements.summary: Coming June 20. A placeholder profile page is live and will be filled in once her kit releases.

announcements.title: Tier List Maker Launched
announcements.summary: Build and export your own custom tier list with drag-and-drop, full color/label customization, and image export.
